visual_description: A close-up shot focuses on a man with a serious and intense expression. He is wearing large, black over-ear headphones and is looking down, presumably at a computer screen just out of frame. The setting is dark, illuminated only by the glow of the screen, which reflects on his face. In the top left corner, white Chinese characters, "风行网," are visible. The audio is filled with a tense and suspenseful electronic score. A low, pulsing synthesizer beat creates a feeling of urgency and anticipation, as if building up to a critical moment. The camera cuts to a close-up of a computer monitor displaying a complex map. The map is rendered in shades of blue and black, with intricate lines and text, suggesting a navigational or surveillance interface. The same white Chinese characters, "风行网," remain in the top left corner. The camera zooms in rapidly on the map, which becomes a blur of blue and black digital pixels, creating a sense of rapid data processing or a digital glitch. The white Chinese characters are still visible in the corner. The shot changes to a medium view of a man in a dimly lit, greenish-hued room. He is wearing a dark jacket and appears to be in a state of alert
